property.name: browser.fullName
property.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

testcase.name: LikeWidgetComponent Should auto-generate ID during ngOnInit when (@Input id) is not assigned
LikeWidgetComponent Should NOT auto-generate ID during ngOnInit when (@Input id) is assigned
LikeWidgetComponent #like should trigger (@Output liked) emission when called
UniqueIdService #getNumberOfGeneratedUniqueIds should return the number of generatedIds when called
UniqueIdService #getNumberOfGeneratedUniqueIds should throw when called with empty
UniqueIdService #generateUniqueIdWithPrefix should generate id when called with prefix
UniqueIdService #generateUniqueIdWithPrefix should not generate duplicate IDs when called multiple times
